name: AnalysisMember
summary: The AnalysisMember class contains information related to analysis members.

constructors.name: AnalysisMember
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisMember class.

methods.name: CopyData
methods.summary: Copies data from another analysis member.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies an analysis member. The AnalysisModelName has to be set.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis member. The AnalysisModelName and ID have to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisDesignCode
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis design code of the member.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: Composite
properties.summary: Gets or sets the composite settings of the member.

properties.name: Curvature
properties.summary: Gets or sets the beam curvature of the member.

properties.name: End
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis beam end settings at the end of the member.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: Label
properties.summary: Gets or sets the label of the analysis member.

properties.name: Material
properties.summary: Gets or sets the material of the analysis member.

properties.name: Start
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis beam end settings at the start of the member.
